As a operator
I want to clear the dock conversation and active flow
So that I can start over without reloading the page

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The topbar reset control appears when items or flow state exist.
- [ ] Reset clears flowState, items, and input.
- [ ] The static greeting remains available after reset.
- [ ] Reset does not alter underlying module data.

Notes: Implemented in OliverDock resetOliver.
